Saya juga telah melakukan sedikit pembaruan pada `services/database.ts` agar fitur *Anti-Curang* (penyimpanan jumlah pelanggaran) berfungsi sepenuhnya dengan database baru ini.

### Langkah 1: Jalankan SQL di Supabase SQL Editor

Buat file baru atau jalankan query ini langsung di dashboard Supabase Anda.

```sql
-- 1. Enable UUID Extension
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";

-- 2. Create ENUMs for integrity
CREATE TYPE user_role_enum AS ENUM ('SUPER_ADMIN', 'ADMIN', 'STUDENT');
CREATE TYPE user_status_enum AS ENUM ('idle', 'working', 'finished', 'blocked');

-- 3. Table: students (Digunakan untuk semua User termasuk Admin)
CREATE TABLE students (
    id UUID DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4() PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    nisn TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, -- Digunakan sebagai username login
    password TEXT DEFAULT '12345',
    role TEXT DEFAULT 'STUDENT', -- Menyimpan string 'SUPER_ADMIN', 'ADMIN', 'STUDENT'
    school TEXT DEFAULT 'UMUM',
    is_login BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'idle', -- idle, working, finished, blocked
    grade INTEGER DEFAULT 6,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now())
);

-- 4. Table: subjects (Mata Pelajaran / Ujian)
CREATE TABLE subjects (
    id UUID DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4() PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    duration INTEGER DEFAULT 60,
    question_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    token TEXT,
    exam_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE,
    session TEXT DEFAULT 'Sesi 1',
    school_access JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, -- Array sekolah yang boleh akses
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now())
);

-- 5. Table: questions
-- NOTE: Menggunakan Double Quotes "" untuk nama kolom agar sesuai dengan mapping di database.ts
CREATE TABLE questions (
    id UUID DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4() PRIMARY KEY,
    subject_id UUID REFERENCES subjects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    "Nomor" TEXT,
    "Tipe Soal" TEXT DEFAULT 'PG',
    "Jenis Soal" TEXT DEFAULT 'UMUM',
    "Soal" TEXT,
    "Url Gambar" TEXT,
    "Opsi A" TEXT,
    "Opsi B" TEXT,
    "Opsi C" TEXT,
    "Opsi D" TEXT,
    "Kunci" TEXT, -- A, B, C, D
    "Bobot" TEXT DEFAULT '10',
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now())
);

-- 6. Table: results (Hasil Ujian)
CREATE TABLE results (
    id UUID DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4() PRIMARY KEY,
    student_id UUID REFERENCES students(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    subject_id UUID REFERENCES subjects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    score NUMERIC DEFAULT 0,
    cheating_attempts INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now())
);

-- 7. Enable Row Level Security (RLS)
ALTER TABLE students ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE subjects ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE questions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE results ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- 8. Create Policies (Mode Development: Allow All Public)
-- Untuk Production, ganti ini dengan kebijakan auth.uid() yang ketat.
CREATE POLICY "Enable all access for all users" ON students FOR ALL USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Enable all access for all users" ON subjects FOR ALL USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Enable all access for all users" ON questions FOR ALL USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Enable all access for all users" ON results FOR ALL USING (true);

-- 9. SEED DATA (Data Awal)

-- Super Admin
INSERT INTO students (name, nisn, password, role, school) 
VALUES ('Super Administrator', 'superadmin', 'admin', 'SUPER_ADMIN', 'PUSAT');

-- Admin Sekolah
INSERT INTO students (name, nisn, password, role, school) 
VALUES ('Admin Sekolah 1', 'admin', 'admin', 'ADMIN', 'SDN 1 CONTOH');

-- Siswa Dummy
INSERT INTO students (name, nisn, password, role, school, grade) 
VALUES 
('Ahmad Siswa', '1001', '12345', 'STUDENT', 'SDN 1 CONTOH', 6),
('Budi Santoso', '1002', '12345', 'STUDENT', 'SDN 2 CONTOH', 6);

-- Mapel Dummy
INSERT INTO subjects (name, duration, token, school_access, exam_date, session)
VALUES ('Matematika - Uji Coba', 60, '12345', '["SDN 1 CONTOH", "SDN 2 CONTOH"]'::jsonb, CURRENT_DATE, 'Sesi 1');
```
